title: Give pull_request preflight a non-required Executor Result Validation identity

sha_binding.verified_source_note: PR #1239 approved at head 88693ae3d03e0202692838db678c5d5a7e372f40 by griff843 pm-verdict/v1 APPROVED, then squash-merged to main as 1d555828eed109bfe3d33f8e9cc5caa1aa202db8. Rebound to the merge SHA during post-merge lane-close reconciliation.

verifier.note: Mechanical checks only. Not independent Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 owner artifact.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

runtime_proof.note: This lane changes only CI workflow logic and pure TS modules; no production code path or migration touched. Live smoke run (apps/api/src/database-smoke.test.ts) regardless per T1 policy.

queries.description: INSERT via processSubmission — one row per synthetic pick, in the 6 of 7 tests that create a pick (all except the read-only UTV2-883 participants test)
INSERT via processSubmission (same 6 tests); UPDATE lifecycle_state via transitionPickLifecycle (queued, posted) and via the settlement RPC path

INSERT on each successful transitionPickLifecycle call and on each successful settlement transition; SELECT COUNT(*) used by three tests (UTV2-920 invalid enqueue/delivery/settlement) to assert zero rows were written for a specific to_state after a rejected atomic operation

INSERT via one successful enqueueDistributionAtomic call (UTV2-920 invalid-delivery test setup); UPDATE status to 'processing' via claimNextAtomic; a separate enqueue attempt (UTV2-920 invalid-enqueue test) is rejected and asserted via findByIdempotencyKey returning null
SELECT COUNT(*) used to assert zero rows were written after a rejected confirmDeliveryAtomic call — no receipt row is created anywhere in this test run

INSERT via recordPickSettlement/settlePickAtomic on successful calls; one settlePickAtomic call (UTV2-920 invalid settlement) is rejected and asserted via SELECT COUNT(*) returning zero; SELECT used to assert exactly one base record (corrects_id null) and that a correction does not mutate the original row

SELECT COUNT(*) used by three tests to assert zero audit rows for a rejected atomic operation (enqueue/delivery/settlement), and by one test to assert at least two audit rows exist for a successful settlement plus its correction
read-only SELECT (listByType('player')) scanning the full live table for the UTV2-883 duplicate (external_id, sport, participant_type) invariant — no writes

known_gaps: The pull_request-triggered Executor Result Validation/Validator check never went green on PR #1239's own commits: the Codex P1 checkout-ref-pin fix pins checkout to the PR base SHA, but scripts/ops/executor-result-validate.ts is itself a new file introduced by this same PR, so it does not exist at the base ref and the workflow's resolve-check-name step fails with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on every pull_request-triggered run of this PR. This is a one-time self-referential bootstrap gap specific to the PR that introduces the file — future PRs will not hit it, since main will already contain the file at their base SHA. PM merged with full repo-owner authority notwithstanding this gap.
P0 Protocol does not run on a direct push to main (only on pull_request), so it has no result on the merge commit itself.
